titleStmt.title: SII 38.204: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 204. (A.R. No. 204 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, of Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: It contains an order (ōlai) of the tānattār of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple. The artisans who made some constructions in stone to the temple and who were to continue to maintain the stone structures were assigned a street called Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-pperunteru from the year Piṅkaḷa. The street was to accommodate not only the stone masons but also the carpenters making wheels, blacksmiths and other who they approve.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉārkoyil tāṉattom Olai . kalkārañceyyum Ācāriyankaḷ kaṇṭu tāṅkaḷ koyilukku veṇṭuṅ kalkārattiruppaṇikaḷ ceyta paṭiyālum piṉpum veṇṭuṅ (ka)
kalkārattiruppaṇikaḷ ceyyak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivarkaḷukku piṅkaḷa samvatsaram mutalāka tiruvītikaḷil vaṭakku tiruvītiyil kaṟpakavallicuram virāmaviḷākam taricukku meṟkku tirupparicārikaḷ taricukkum kucavaṉviṭṭukku vaṭakku
m Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉtoppil Oṭaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭakkil O(au)ṭaikkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uḷppaṭṭa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira(�)pperunteru taṅkaḷukkum cakaṭaitaccaṉukkum taṅkaḷu
kku Icainta karumāṅkakumRead karumāṉukkumItteru kāṇiyākak kaṭavatākavum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa maramuṅkiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭṭa nāṟpattoṇṇāyirapperunterut taṅkaḷukkun taṅkaḷ cantāṉattāṟkum cantirātittava
raikāṇi Ā(yā)kak kuṭuttom Ippaṭikkuk kallumveṭṭik koḷvatākac coṉṉom Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiltāṉattom § Itu śrīmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 38.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
